meta.title: Infermatik — Enterprise Content Intelligence Platform
meta.description: Infermatik uses AI to read document, audio, and video content and turn it into structured data. Enterprise content intelligence.

stp.label: STP (Straight-Through Processing) explanation
stp.tooltip: Straight-Through Processing is the rate at which a process is completed end to end without human intervention. A higher rate means faster operations, fewer errors, and lower manual review cost.

hero.sub: Your documents, audio, and video are read and interpreted with AI, flowing into your decision-making as data.

problem.title: Enterprise content has become an enterprise burden.
problem.intro: Contracts, invoices, customer calls, field video — the volume of content keeps growing, yet valuable data is still extracted with human effort. That is slow, costly, and does not scale.

problems.title: Manual data entry
problems.body: Thousands of documents, recordings, and videos are read by hand and typed into systems.

problems.title: Inconsistent accuracy
problems.body: Fatigue, attention, and person-to-person differences drive high error rates; the process is unpredictable.

problems.title: Processes that do not scale
problems.body: Volume grows but headcount does not. Every new document type means more work.

problems.title: Dark content
problems.body: Recordings and video sit in archives; the information inside is never used.

problems.title: Weak auditability
problems.body: Which decision was based on which content? There is no end-to-end traceability.

problems.title: Complex structures
problems.body: Handwriting, stamps, tables, multi-speaker audio — existing tools fall short.

steps.title: Bring in content
steps.body: Document, audio, or video — single or bulk. Drag-and-drop, API, email, or system integration.

steps.title: Let AI interpret
steps.body: Text is extracted, transcribed, summarized. Structure, intent, and key fields are recognized automatically.

steps.title: Feed your processes
steps.body: Your teams review and approve; data flows cleanly into ERP, CRM, or workflow tools.

capabilities.title: One platform, full content intelligence.
capabilities.intro: Infermatik works across content types with the same template, review, and reporting logic. Set it up once, use it in every department.

items.title: Template management
items.body: Define a template once per content type; Infermatik applies the same extraction consistently, every time.

items.title: Automatic extraction
items.body: Structured data from text, tables, handwriting, audio, and video in seconds.

items.title: Batch processing
items.body: Hundreds of items processed in parallel; retry failures with one click.

items.title: Human-in-the-loop
items.body: AI assists; it does not replace judgment. Every result is reviewed with a full audit trail.

items.title: System integration
items.body: Clean data into SAP, CRM, and workflow systems; real-time webhooks and APIs.

items.title: Reporting
items.body: Template performance, accuracy, STP (Straight-Through Processing), and team productivity in one dashboard.

sectors.title: From documents to data, from data to decisions.

items.title: Smart claims and fraud control
items.body: Claims files, adjuster reports, photos, and videos are analyzed together.
items.problem: Manual claims review is slow, and inconsistencies between reports, policies, and field evidence are hard to catch. That creates fraud risk and operational cost.
useCases: Generate a preliminary assessment score from photos, videos, and adjuster reports.
Detect contradictions across policies, claim statements, and contract clauses.
Flag duplicate claims, reused images, and suspicious file patterns.
items.decision: Infermatik does not only extract fields; it produces decision support signals for claim validity, risk level, and review priority.
metrics: Hours of file review become a structured preliminary assessment in seconds.
Fraud checks become standardized while STP (Straight-Through Processing) and decision consistency improve.

items.title: Zero-error extraction and compliance
items.body: Declarations, invoices, contracts, stamps, and tables are cross-checked.
items.problem: In customs workflows, even a small manual entry error can become a compliance issue, delay, or heavy regulatory penalty.
useCases: Extract data from invoices and declarations with handwriting, stamps, and complex tables.
Compare invoice, declaration, and contract line items in one context.
Check each transaction against current customs rules and internal standards.
items.decision: The Decision Intelligence layer catches mismatches such as line-item differences between invoice and declaration before the transaction is completed.
metrics: Manual control load drops while error-free processing and STP (Straight-Through Processing) rates improve.
Penalty, delay, and rework costs are reduced.

items.title: Credit, risk, and contract analysis
items.body: Application files, income statements, and contracts become decision-ready data.
items.problem: Credit and risk teams need to evaluate many documents, past agreements, and customer statements quickly while keeping the process auditable.
useCases: Extract risk signals from credit applications and income statements.
Analyze contradictions between contracts and amendments.
Run compliance and customer intent checks from call recordings.
items.decision: The file is not just summarized; Infermatik produces explainable support for approve, reject, or request-more-review decisions.
metrics: File preparation time drops, and missing or inconsistent information is caught earlier.
Risk analysis and audit trail are created in the same flow.

items.title: Candidate matching and contract standards
items.body: CVs, job descriptions, evaluation notes, and employee contracts are interpreted.
items.problem: CV screening and contract review often depend on keywords and manual judgment, so strong candidates or risky clauses can be missed.
useCases: Infer the relationship between CV experience and job requirements.
Review employee contracts against internal standards and legal requirements.
Produce shortlist suggestions from interview notes and candidate documents.
items.decision: Candidates are ranked by experience context and role fit, not just keyword matches.
metrics: Shortlisting accelerates and evaluation standards become consistent.
Contract errors are caught before publication.

items.title: Contradiction analysis and argument generation
items.body: Contracts, invoices, correspondence, and audit notes are connected into one knowledge layer.
items.problem: Legal risk often hides in contradictions across files; reading past correspondence, contracts, and invoices together takes time.
useCases: Bring all documents related to one organization or person into a single case context.
Find logical contradictions across clauses, invoices, and correspondence.
Create source-backed document lists for audits and litigation preparation.
items.decision: Infermatik turns the document pool into strategic findings and defensible argument paths.
metrics: Research time falls and the risk of missing critical documents decreases.
Every finding remains linked to its source document, strengthening auditability.

items.title: Real-time control from image and audio
items.body: Field video, photos, and voice recordings are matched with operating standards.
items.problem: Visual and audio evidence from the field often stays in archives, so safety breaches or operational errors are noticed late.
useCases: Detect non-standard conditions from camera footage and field photos.
Extract intent, action, and risk signals from voice recordings.
Connect operational checklists with visual evidence.
items.decision: Field data is compared with internal standards to produce alerts and recommended actions.
metrics: Incident detection accelerates and manual monitoring load decreases.
Operational errors and safety risks become visible earlier.

items.title: Compliance, request, and coordination intelligence
items.body: Call recordings, dealer paperwork, and multi-channel requests are classified.
items.problem: Customer calls, dealer processes, and public requests are scattered across channels, making compliance and routing harder.
useCases: Extract intent, action, and compliance risk from call recordings.
Catch missing or inconsistent information in dealer documents and stock forms.
Classify requests from channels such as CIMER, social media, and email.
items.decision: Infermatik suggests the right unit, priority, and response based on past resolution patterns.
metrics: Request classification and routing time decreases.
Compliance checks become traceable at conversation and document level.

items.title: Ask Your Documents and knowledge graph
items.body: Past files, policies, correspondence, and reports become queryable.
items.problem: An organization’s most valuable knowledge is scattered across old files, making it hard for teams to reuse past experience.
useCases: Build a Knowledge Graph from claims, policies, customs correspondence, and contracts.
Ask documents specific questions in natural language.
Surface similar files, past decisions, and repeated risks.
items.decision: Past institutional experience is brought into the context of new decisions, so teams get answers instead of searching for files.
metrics: Knowledge search time drops and decisions become grounded in historical data.
Answers are reliable and traceable through source-document links.

value.title: Before and after. The difference is measurable.
value.intro: Infermatik is not just speed; it is a traceable, auditable, and safely scalable way of working.
before: Accuracy that depends on the person
Audio and video left as dead weight in the archive
Every new document type means new workload
after: Meaningful signals from every content type
Define templates and scale without limits

pillars.title: Enterprise security
pillars.body: Role-based access, team isolation, centralized identity.

pillars.title: Flexible deployment
pillars.body: Cloud or on‑prem; your data stays under your control.

pillars.title: Full audit trail
pillars.body: Every action and change — with versioning and rollback where needed.

cta.title: Let us plan a demo tailored to your organization.
cta.body: See how Infermatik works on your own documents, audio, and video samples. In a 30-minute session we walk through your use case.
